item.text:
A system of pipes connects cargo tanks to |manifolds*money folds|.

Portable |drip trays*trip trays| are placed under all ship and shore connections.

The |crossover*gross over| valves separate the main lines from each other.

Wing tanks are on port and |starboard*star port| sides of the ship.

The ship should have emergency towing-off |wires*fires| ready.

The tanks are |topped-off*dropped off|.

There are joints, |bends*pens| and valves in the pipelines.

The cargo is pumped on board by shore |pumps*bumps|.
